content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: Pinnacle Education
Customer ID: C006
Contract ID: K017
Account Executive: Tom Rivera
Deal Type: Renewal + Upgrade
Date: February 1, 2024

DEAL SUMMARY
Renewed Pinnacle Education and upgraded from Starter to Enterprise, expanding from 10 to 50 users. Applied 5% discount. New ARR: $42,750.

RENEWAL NOTES
Significant expansion driven by a decision to roll DataSync Pro out to all three campuses including faculty and administrative staff. Rachel Kim secured internal budget approval by presenting the accreditation audit trail use case to the President's office, which created top-down support for the expansion.

NEGOTIATION NOTES
Tom Rivera offered a 5% discount to recognize the significant user count increase and to secure a two-year commitment. Pinnacle accepted a one-year renewal but indicated willingness to discuss a multi-year deal in 2025 if the expanded rollout goes smoothly.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
A two-year deal in 2025 is the primary goal. Rachel Kim also mentioned potential interest in InsightIQ for their institutional research team — flag for cross-sell conversation mid-2024.
